student_academic_performance.csv.description: Student performance. Student ID is the identifier.

adv_unique_names.csv.description: Name column with all unique values (looks like ID to cardinality)

adv_index_column.csv.description: Has Unnamed/index column that should be ignored

adv_all_numeric.csv.description: All columns are numeric measures, no entity

adv_all_strings.csv.description: All columns are generic strings, no entity

adv_status_only.csv.description: Only status/boolean columns, no business entity

adv_code_only.csv.description: Only code/SKU/reference columns with no descriptive fields

adv_hard_generic_props.csv.description: key, value, description — generic KVP table

adv_hard_generic_codes.csv.description: code, label, category, sort_order — lookup table

adv_hard_mixed_policies.csv.description: policy_id, customer_id, agent_id, product_id — policy should win

adv_hard_mixed_appointments.csv.description: appointment_id, patient_id, doctor_id, room_id — appointment should win

adv_hard_mixed_logistics.csv.description: shipment_id, order_id, warehouse_id, carrier_id — shipment should win

adv_hard_traps_lookup_only.csv.description: country_code, country_name, region — simple lookup table
